data.body: LAND PHASE — REBASE REQUIRED. First push (changes 399-406) got Verified -1 on 401(#2): NOT the perf flake — origin/main had ADVANCED 23 commits (c005f242b -> 1c432ca13) adding a per-file module-size GROWTH-RATCHET (.github/module-size-ceilings.txt) + janitor decomposition shrinking config/reconcile/det_floor. My stale-based stack carried old-large files tripping main's new ceilings (module-size gate is a SEPARATE GH-Actions step NOT run by make lint/test — the pre-flight gap). FIX: rebased 8-commit stack onto origin/main (CLEAN, no conflicts; 8 overlapping files auto-merged). Raised 2 ceilings my features legitimately grew: det_floor.py 849->946 (#4 G5 signal), passes.py 839->852 (#2 recall), in bottom commit #4 (189c6c6d1) + ceilings-file note; architecture.md remedy rows already present. All 8 Change-Ids preserved. Full CI on rebased stack incl module-size gate: soft-cap OK, ceilings OK, lint+mypy(281 files) clean, 4780 passed 0 failed. Re-pushed HEAD=073933565 -> updated 399-406 new patchsets (prior votes wiped, re-voting). NEW STACK TIP 073933565 = REBAR_GATE_REF for completion gates at close. Change->child map: 399=#4(deterministic-G5) 400=#1(plan-impact) 401=#2(recall) 402=#5(thresholds) 403=#6(code-impact) 404=#7(nit-suppress) 405=#8(code_review-artifact) 406=#3(rollout). Awaiting 16 votes; watch for graph-perf timing flake (recheck) + module-size (now fixed).
